chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Constitution Petition No. D – 4287 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES Priority. 1. For hearing of CMA No.17670/2025. 2. For hearing of main case 11.09.2025 Mr. Aqeel Ahmed Khan, Advocate for the Petitioner. Sardar Zafar Hussain, Advocate for the Respondent. Mr. Muhammad Akbar Khan, Asstt. Attorney General. ----------- Against the Assessment order, the Petitioner has preferred an appeal to the Collector of Custom (Appeals). Learned counsel confines the petition for release of imported goods by way of securing the differential duty and taxes with this Court. Since there is no issue to the importability of the goods, we are inclined to allow the petition to that extent. Therefore, the petitioner shall deposit the undisputed amount of duty and taxes with the department, whereas the disputed amount shall be secured with the Nazir of this Court by way of pay-orders or bank guarantee. Upon a certificate by the Nazir to that effect, the Customs shall release the subject goods (GD No.KEWB-HC-1598- 31.07.2025) forthwith. In case the amount is secured by pay-orders, same shall be invested by the Nazir as per Rules. The security shall be subject to the outcome of the appeal aforesaid. The Nazir's fee is fixed at Rs. 10,000/- per certificate. Petition is disposed of accordingly along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Nadeem Qureshi P.A.
